key_insights.insight: True self-awareness requires the ability to objectively critique one's own work or behavior as if it were separate from oneself.
key_insights.quote: You have to practice being able to take the piss out of the thing,criticize the thing. No, someone's not coming up to you and going,you're ugly, you're unlovable, you've got a big nose,you're not tall enough.

key_insights.insight: The key to long-term success is loving the journey and the daily grind, not just the end rewards.
key_insights.quote: the answer is boring repetitive practice for most most people that are absolutely fucking excellent at something have done a lot of boring repetitive practice that would be boring to theperson asking the question not to us i loved every shit gig i did and that's the difference

key_insights.insight: 'Luck' is often the result of being observant, proactive, and open to opportunities.
key_insights.quote: lucky people areeyes are open the hustlers so it turns out you can make luck you can practice that you can hone it

key_insights.insight: Obesity is a metabolic condition that causes overeating, not the other way around, requiring compassion and a nuanced approach to weight loss.
key_insights.quote: Being overweight causes you to eat too much. Once you have the metabolic condition of being overweight, that fucks yourcircuitry, which drives you to eat more. Obesity causes calorie surplus.

key_insights.insight: Hard work is more sustainable and fulfilling when directed toward something you genuinely enjoy.
key_insights.quote: working hard at things you love I'm i finished filming at midnight lastnight in mates and i got in at half one i had my dinner at two and I fell asleep at three and I bounced out of bed this morning to come hereto do a podcast for the price of a car. Why? Because I love what I do.

key_insights.insight: To avoid becoming complacent in your craft, constantly seek out challenging and unfamiliar situations.
key_insights.quote: the danger is themore successful you get, you lose the muscle of walking into a room full of skeptics. And if youlose that muscle, that's the money-making muscle. So practice it.

key_insights.insight: Men should be open with partners about their thoughts and feelings.
key_insights.quote: a man should go.I haven't done anything,but I'm having these thoughts. What does it mean? Does it mean we're not in love?

key_insights.insight: A supportive partner is someone who understands and supports your goals, even if it means accepting certain aspects of your career or lifestyle.
key_insights.quote: You need somebody who gets it.

actionable_advice.advice: Practice criticizing your own work by separating yourself from it and looking for faults.
actionable_advice.how_to: Treat your work (writing, business plan, etc.) as an object separate from yourself. Identify weaknesses, areas for improvement, and potential flaws. Ask for feedback and be open to criticism.

actionable_advice.advice: Seek smaller, harder, unideal situations in business to keep your conversion skills sharp.
actionable_advice.how_to: Actively pursue challenging opportunities, like pitching to skeptical investors, taking on difficult clients, or entering unfamiliar markets. This maintains adaptability and prevents complacency.

actionable_advice.advice: Skip breakfast to activate autophagy and apoptosis for cellular health.
actionable_advice.how_to: Delay your first meal to have a 16 hour fasting gap each day. Only have coffee and water.

actionable_advice.advice: Lowering carbohydrate intake to maintain cellular health.
actionable_advice.how_to: Lower your carbohydrate intake to 100-120 net grams a day. Replace white carbohydrates with whole-meal carbohydrates.

actionable_advice.advice: For hair loss take PQQ, NMN and Resveratrol in the morning.
actionable_advice.how_to: In the morning take take phytacin, chloroquine, PQQ, 750 milligrams of NMN and a gram of resveratrol.

memorable_stories: Kane describes his father as a 'steroid taking, shaven headed, silverback, doorman, right wing, angry, council estate, working class, barbell, curl, semi-professional, bodybuilder, lifeguard, sheet metal worker, lagger, nutter'.
Kane recounts literally pissing himself in fear as a child when his father approached after he had upset his brother.
Kane describes his initial experience with stand-up comedy as being like an addict experiencing MDMA.
The anecdote of giving people newspaper with headline about money and seeing that lucky people open their eyes to seeing it whereas unlucky people don't.
contrarian_claims: Eating too much does not make you overweight; being overweight causes you to eat too much.
Social media is not good at having nuance.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Russell Kane: How To Build Confidence & Stay Young
